examples: There are doubts about the usefulness of these tests.
Man early learned the usefulness of weapons.
If an interactive computer screen is to match a whiteboard in usefulness, it must be viewable from arm's length as well as from across a room.
Move past that clumsy integration and you're left to parse the actual usefulness of the stylus.
So when does the price and the usefulness equation stop people wanting Photoshop at all?
